name: Nitto Kako Co.,Ltd.
summary: Nitto Kako Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells industrial rubber and resin products in Japan. The company provides rubber sheets for various applications, such as automobiles, chemicals, civil engineering construction, packing, cushioning materials, rugs, etc.; construction, civil engineering, and landscape materials, which are used in the areas of permeability, cushioning, cushioning materials, curing, vibration protection, anti- slip, turf protection, etc.; and functional rubber mats, such as icebreaker anti-slip, frozen road surface correspondence, oil removal, etc. It also offers powdered rubber products, an environmentally friendly product based on rubber powder recycled from tires; orbit related products to JR companies and other non-railway companies; rubber compounds to rubber molding manufacturers; and resin products, including cleaning and foaming agents, and antistatic resin products. The company was formerly known as Nitto Tire Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Nitto Kako Co.,Ltd. in April 1982. Nitto Kako Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1949 and is based in Samukawa, Japan.
